title: Cannot install podman on Ubuntu Xenial
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

We used to have podman working in Travis CI: https://travis-ci.org/adelton/freeipa-container/jobs/501425643.

Today the job fails with
```
Errors were encountered while processing:
 /var/cache/apt/archives/skopeo-containers_0.1.35-1~dev~ubuntu16.04.2~ppa2_amd64.deb
```
https://travis-ci.org/freeipa/freeipa-container/jobs/506734132

I was able to reproduce the issue on Ubuntu Xenial (in container but that should not matter).

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `apt-get update`
2. `apt-get install -y software-properties-common`
3. `add-apt-repository -y ppa:projectatomic/ppa`
4. `apt-get update`
5. `apt-get install -y podman`

**Describe the results you received:**

**Describe the results you expected:**
No error, the `podman` installed from `ppa:projectatomic/ppa` should have reasonable dependencies.

comments.body: The https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2116 might be a generic issue but note that there, people already seem to have things installed. In this issue I'm specifically commenting on the fact that I cannot even install `podman` on Xenial. Please consider reopening / fixing the dependency issue.
I updated podman last night but looks like I forgot to add conmon since I removed dependency on cri-o. I'll add the independent conmon package as well in a bit.
@adelton I pushed new builds. Please refresh your repo and install them.
With `podman 1.2.0-1~ubuntu16.04.2~ppa7` and `cri-o-runc 1.0.0-rc6-1~ubuntu16.04.2~ppa70` things are back to working: https://travis-ci.org/adelton/freeipa-container/jobs/508109332
